/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ecl_test_linear_algebra_formatters.dir/formatters.cpp.o -o ecl_test_linear_algebra_formatters  -Wl,-rpath,/home/embedded/ros2_ws/build/ecl_linear_algebra/src/lib:/home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_formatters/lib:/home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_exceptions/lib:/home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_errors/lib:/home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_type_traits/lib ../../gtest/libgtest_main.a ../../gtest/libgtest.a ../lib/libecl_linear_algebra.so.1.2.1 /home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_formatters/lib/libecl_formatters.so.1.2.1 -pthread /home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_exceptions/lib/libecl_exceptions.so.1.2.1 /home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_errors/lib/libecl_errors.so.1.2.0 /home/embedded/ros2_ws/install/ecl_type_traits/lib/libecl_type_traits.so.1.2.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libceres.so.2.2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libglog.so.0.6.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2
